Retribution (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $6,937,696Details
International Box Office $6,626,505
Worldwide Box Office $13,564,201
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $557,446
Total $557,446
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When a mysterious caller puts a bomb under his car seat, Matt Turner begins a high-speed chase across the city to complete a specific series of tasks. With his kids trapped in the back seat and a bomb that will explode if they get out of the car, a normal commute becomes a twisted game of life or death as Matt follows the stranger’s increasingly dangerous instructions in a race against time to save his family.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$3,518,830 (50.7% of total gross)
Legs:1.97 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:51.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:1,750 opening theaters/1,750 max. theaters, 2.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $7,584,542

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 25th, 2023 (Wide) by Roadside Attractions
International Releases: August 23rd, 2023 (Wide) (France)
August 24th, 2023 (Limited), released as Jízda smrti (Czech Republic)
August 24th, 2023 (Limited), released as Vražedná jazda (Slovakia)
August 24th, 2023 (Limited) (New Zealand)
August 24th, 2023 (Limited), released as Retribution (Заложники) (Russia (CIS))
Video Release: September 15th, 2023 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for some language and violence.
(Rating bulletin 2796 (cert #54410), 8/16/2023)
Running Time: 90 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Foreign-Language Remake, Remake
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: StudioCanal, The Picture Company, Ombra Films, TFI Films, Studio Babelsberg, Canal Plus, Cine Plus, TMC, Lionsgate, Roadside Attractions
Production Countries: United States, Germany, Spain, France
Languages: English

Synopsis

When a mysterious caller puts a bomb under his car seat, Matt Turner begins a high-speed chase across the city to complete a specific series of tasks. With his kids trapped in the back seat and a bomb that will explode if they get out of the car, a normal commute becomes a twisted game of life or death as Matt follows the stranger’s increasingly dangerous instructions in a race against time to save his family.
